buildCommand: git -C ../../ submodule update --init --recursive packages/community-contracts/lib && curl -L https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && export PATH="$HOME/.foundry/bin:$PATH" && foundryup && pnpm --filter @status-im/community-contracts run build && pnpm --filter @status-im/js run build && pnpm --filter @status-im/community-dapp run generate:proto && NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider pnpm exec webpack --mode=production
